group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The study investigates "Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone for metastatic patients starting hormone therapy". Therefore, the Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1 is "Abiraterone acetate plus prednisolone".
columns.column_name_raw: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
